Mallory Livia is a skilled yet unassuming laundry maid and seamstress serving under King Itotz Khione. With nimble fingers and a quiet resolve, she weaves her dreams into every stitch, hoping one day to break free from servitude and create a life of her own. Beneath her practical and composed exterior, she harbors an unshakable ambitionвЂ”to trade the drudgery of castle work for the freedom of artistry, crafting garments that tell stories of resilience and beauty.

Cold Companionship in...

Ecille

The Kingdom of Ecille is a land of eternal winter, where towering mountains and frozen tundras stretch endlessly beneath a sky of pale light. Snow and ice shape both the land and its people, forging them into something as unyielding as the frost itself. The howling winds carry whispers of forgotten legends, while shimmering ice caverns hide secrets deep within the mountains. Harsh yet breathtaking, Ecille is a realm where only the strong endure, ruled with an iron will by its formidable king, Itotz Khione.
